calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Mar-24-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of two Minors.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Petitioner: Xiao Ping Fang present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minors: Xiao Ying Fang and Xiao Tong Fang, and with Cantonese Interpreter Jenna Zhang.
Petitioner and Interpreter were sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name of the Minors were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minors to: Samantha Xiaoying Fang and Cecilia Xiaotong Fang.
Decree signed in open court.
